description:
Remediation epic for specled_-47j (P1: Coverage.Formatter fabricated artifact + O(tests x modules) cost). Full validated root-cause report and design: workflow wf_a72896ee-645 (session 0a6853df); digest in specled_-47j comments.

Design: Aggregate-First hybrid. Default mode: mix spec.cover.test runs 'mix test --cover --export-coverage specled' with NO formatter, then ingests the coverdata into a versioned v2 envelope (async-safe, O(codebase)). mix spec.cover.ingest <path.coverdata> is the coveralls/CI escape hatch. Per-test attribution is an opt-in --per-test lane on OTP 27+ native read-only coverage deltas (diff, NEVER :cover.reset — reset corrupts the wrapped --cover tally) with classic per-module fallback and fail-closed guardrails. Formatter is inert unless armed by the task via the :specled_ex app-env seam. Headline metric: % of realization-closure MFAs covered by ANY test; 'self-verified' composite verdict (closure covered + >=1 executed tagged test) for spec-own-test semantics; exact attribution only in --per-test mode.

Maintainer decisions (2026-07-23, all five resolved):
1. Triangulation consumers are spec.triangle + spec.review ONLY — rescope spec text; do NOT wire triangulation into mix spec.check (spec.check stays fast). No gate-wiring follow-up ticket.
2. Keep the name mix spec.cover.test; behavior change carried by loud 0.4.0 release notes.
3. Ship the rebuilt --per-test lane in the same release.
4. OTP posture: recommend >= 27.2 for the native path, do not hard-gate; try/catch mitigates.
5. Legacy artifacts rejected as :legacy_artifact with a clear message naming the re-run command; no auto-migrate/delete.

Sequencing:
```mermaid
graph LR
    T1[T1 store v2] --> T2[T2 aggregate ingest]
    T1 --> T4[T4 formatter disarm]
    T2 --> T3[T3 cover.test rework]
    T2 --> T6[T6 triangulation]
    T3 --> T5[T5 per-test lane]
    T4 --> T5
    T6 --> T7[T7 review rendering]
    T3 --> T8[T8 spec+ADR edits]
    T5 --> T8
    T7 --> T8
    T8 --> T9[T9 docs sweep]
```
T4 is the minimal early-ship candidate (stops garbage production immediately).

comments.text: ORCHESTRATOR POLICY (applies to all children): each code ticket ships additively so every intermediate epic state stays green (merge gate = compile -Werror, test, format, deps.unlock, spec.check after every close). Callers migrate in their owning tickets. Spec co-change is limited to requirement text/stubs a diff directly invalidates; the consolidation rewrite + new ADR remain specled_-155.8. Allowed-touches / Out-of-Scope / Verification sections are appended to each child at admission time.

LESSONS\n- [other] When touching a file with api_boundary-bound functions, append new code below the existing bound functions — line shifts above them trigger spurious branch_guard_realization_drift via the strip_meta line-leak bug specled_-wp7 (from specled_-155.1)

MERGE GATE 1 (after specled_-155.1, epic @ 14a22d4): GREEN. compile -Werror ok; mix test 3 properties + 1041 tests, 0 failures; format ok; deps.unlock ok; mix spec.check exit 0 findings=0. Advisory: one stray 'specled_cmd_*.sh: No such file or directory' line mid-suite (tempfile command-exec race, specled_-epl class) — no test failed, not a flake-accept.

MERGE GATE 2 (after specled_-155.2, epic @ 68f7c68): GREEN. compile -Werror ok; 3 properties + 1057 tests, 0 failures; format ok; deps.unlock ok; spec.check exit 0 status=pass (findings=1 = the trailer-downgraded branch_guard_missing_decision_update at info — ratified by verify pass, non-blocking). ADMISSION NOTE: T3 (specled_-155.3) intentionally held until T4 merges — both edit lib/mix/tasks/spec.cover.test.ex and admitting T3 pre-T4 guarantees a real-code rebase conflict. T6 admitted now.

MERGE GATE 3 (after specled_-155.4, epic @ 81006e9): GREEN. compile -Werror ok; 3 properties + 1068 tests, 0 failures; format ok; deps.unlock ok; spec.check exit 0 status=pass (findings=2 = the two ratified info-severity Spec-Drift self-reports from 155.2/155.4). T4 landed via clean rebase (no real conflicts). Hotfix milestone: fabrication clauses deleted, formatter disarmed-by-default, line-level snapshots on the armed path — the specled_-47j garbage-production mechanism is dead on this branch. T3 hold released.

LESSONS\n- [other] When touching a file with api_boundary-bound functions, append new code below the existing bound functions — line shifts above them trigger spurious branch_guard_realization_drift via the strip_meta line-leak bug specled_-wp7 (from specled_-155.1)\n- [stale-spec] Before letting mix spec.check seed realization hashes for brand-new bound functions, run mix compile --force — seeding against a stale _build records wrong hashes that surface as api_boundary mismatches on the next run (from specled_-155.6)

MERGE GATE 4 (after specled_-155.3, epic @ 9607c97): GREEN. compile -Werror ok; 3 properties + 1074 tests, 0 failures; format ok; deps.unlock ok; spec.check exit 0 status=pass (findings=2, same ratified info pair). Default aggregate path complete: spec.cover.test default mode = plain 'mix test --cover --export-coverage' + ingest, exit-code passthrough, loud refusals; per-test capture is opt-in --per-test with async hard-fail/--allow-async degrade.

MERGE GATE 5 (after specled_-155.6, epic @ 2bc0fc8): GREEN. compile -Werror ok; 3 properties + 1102 tests, 0 failures; format ok; deps.unlock ok; spec.check exit 0 status=pass (findings=2, ratified info pair). Data layer complete: envelope-based triangulation + CoverageClosure landed additively; envelope_findings/3 + build_v2/2 await their production callers in T7.

title: Aggregate-first spec coverage — specled_-47j remediation
